title: 5 apps making $100k+/month (and how to clone them)

slides.headline: 5 apps making $100k+/month
slides.body: And exactly how to clone them
slides.visual_note: Dark gradient background, bold white text, dollar signs floating

slides.headline: 1. Calm ($8M/month)
slides.body: Sleep sounds + meditation. Clone it: Pick a niche (faith, fitness, kids). Add 50 audio tracks. Charge $69/year.

slides.headline: 2. Forest ($400k/month)
slides.body: Plant trees while you focus. Clone it: Screen time blocker with cute visuals. Gamify with streaks. $4.99 one-time or $29/year.
slides.visual_note: Forest app UI example, tree growing animation concept

slides.headline: 3. Headspace ($120M ARR)
slides.body: Guided meditation for normies. Clone it: Niche down. Muslim meditation. Christian devotionals. 10-min daily sessions.

slides.headline: 4. Duolingo ($531M ARR)
slides.body: Language learning streaks. Clone it: Apply gamification to any learning. Quran memorization. Bible study. Math facts.
slides.visual_note: Streak counter UI, XP points visual

slides.headline: 5. Be My Eyes ($0 but 7M users)
slides.body: Volunteer to help blind users. Clone it: Build for other accessibility needs. Hearing assistance. Elder tech support.

slides.headline: The pattern?
slides.body: All of these: Solve one problem. Simple UI. Subscription model. Niche targeting beats competing with giants.

slides.headline: Where to find clone targets
slides.body: AppKittie.com for trending apps. Product Hunt for launches. App Store top charts, filtered by category.

cta_slide.headline: Building my first clone this week
